description:
Momo sneaks into RitoвАЩs bed. Mikan, who wants to catch Momo, sneaks in as well but does not find anything. She does, however, end up staying the night. Rito and Lala pursue a drunk Celine, who spreads her pollen to Yami, which causes her to fall for Rito. Haruna cannot fight her feelings any longer, so she tells Lala that she also likes Rito.
Source: crunchyroll
